The '''Shock Cannon''' was a deployable heavy weapon employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was a portable gun emplacement that moved under its own power. Deployed on the battlefield, it was used to take out heavily armored targets, such as [[Fortress/Legends|fortresses]] and bunkers.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Shock Cannons appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
